title: Arch-Engine Diagnostic Output Schema
description: Defines the categorical diagnostic output contract for @arch-engine/core federation diagnostics. Diagnostic surfaces are observational only — they MUST NOT participate in authority resolution, closure identity computation, replay validation, or signature verification.

DiagnosticEntry.description: A single diagnostic observation. All fields are categorical — no numeric ranking weights, floating capability scores, trust coefficients, or descriptor match gradients are permitted.

seamId.description: Identifier of the seam being diagnosed.

conflictDetected.description: Whether a conflict was detected during resolution.

strategyUsed.description: Name of the resolution strategy applied.

registryTrustPreferenceApplied.description: Whether registry trust preference influenced resolution.

selectionConfidence.description: Categorical confidence classification. NOT a numeric score.

tieBreakerType.description: Type of tiebreaker applied, if any.

ForbiddenFields.description: The following field categories are PERMANENTLY FORBIDDEN from diagnostic output surfaces. This definition exists as a governance annotation, not a runtime schema element.

_GOVERNANCE_NOTE.const: The following are NEVER permitted in diagnostic output: numericRankingWeights, floatingCapabilityScores, trustCoefficients, descriptorMatchGradients, rawComparatorInternals, candidateEvaluationIndexes, iterationOrderArtifacts, registryArrivalOrdering, transportDiscoveryOrder, mirrorArrivalOrder, timeDependentMetadata
